projects.title: Cloud-Native Inventory Tracker
projects.tagline: Scalable, secure inventory management system deployed on AWS
projects.problem: Local business inventories suffer from sync latency, high server costs, and weak data redundancy schemes.
projects.solution: Built a serverless inventory sync app using Next.js, and deployed on AWS utilizing S3, Lambda, and DynamoDB for low-cost, auto-scaling operations.
contributions: Configured AWS VPC with public/private subnets, NAT Gateways, and Security Groups.
Programmed AWS Lambda API functions to process stock entries asynchronously.
Orchestrated team timelines, held daily scrums, and conducted the final demonstration.
projects.architecture: AWS API Gateway routes requests to Lambda. Static assets are served via CloudFront + S3. Data is persisted in DynamoDB with IAM role access.
projects.lessons: AWS serverless scales beautifully but cold starts can occur. I optimized Lambda bundles and configured DynamoDB provisioned throughput.

projects.title: EcoShop E-Commerce UI/UX & Brand Case Study
projects.tagline: User-centered design system and high-fidelity prototype for eco-friendly shopping
projects.problem: Eco-friendly shoppers struggle to verify vendor certifications, leading to checkout dropouts due to lack of trust.
projects.solution: Conducted UX interviews, mapped out wireframes, and designed a certified eco-badge component with transparent documentation. Prototype tested with a 35% checkout improvement.
contributions: Conducted user research and created 3 target personas.
Built a complete Design System in Figma (typography scale, components, tokens).
Designed and animated high-fidelity desktop and mobile wireframe flows.
projects.architecture: UX Flow starts from onboarding, flows to verified vendor detail, customized checkout, and real-time carbon offsets dashboard.
projects.lessons: Visual hierarchy is secondary to structural clarity. Aligning badge verification with product labels significantly decreased cart abandonment.

projects.title: Automated Billing & Client Management Portal
projects.tagline: Responsive management portal for Fiverr design clients
projects.problem: Freelance contract designers spend hours tracking invoice sheets and sharing project assets manually across chats.
projects.solution: Built a customer portal with automatic invoice Generation and file delivery integrations.
contributions: Developed custom dashboard layout with CSS Modules.
Integrated secure Stripe webhook API and automatic invoice mailers.
Hosted server on AWS EC2 with PM2 and Nginx reverse proxy configuration.
projects.architecture: Node client talks to Express backend. Files are deposited securely in AWS S3 and served via CloudFront presigned URLs.
projects.lessons: Securing file downloads via S3 presigned URLs prevented resource hotlinking and improved security metrics.
